{"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"system_unready: Description follows PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE/PROPOSED FIX/NON-SCOPE structure with concrete file:line evidence (cli/internal/server/workers_supervisor.go:181-184, 392-520) and a governing artifact (ddx-9c53e551). Proposed fix is narrowly scoped: a read-only helper/DTO exposing the latest blocked terminal reason, reusing existing structured fd-exhaustion fields, for ddx worker status to consume later. NON-SCOPE excludes desired-state persistence, restart policy, CLI formatting, resource-guard changes, and overlap with ddx-b17cad6d/ddx-4d92f2cf. AC names two specific Test* functions describing exactly what each must prove, gives a runnable -run filter, and includes the standard go test + lefthook gates. A competent agent can pick the file and write the tests without further clarification. The single prior_attempt is execution_failed with rationale 'session closed before Stop hook' — a session/infra interruption, not a content blocker or scope objection — so it does not affect readiness and the bead is safe to retry as-is.","fingerprint":"2bdb1c81cde8514d2edd5297da0627d2838210dfbe8d117081544198e19ec62e","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"system_unready","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.system_unready","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"2bdb1c81cde8514d2edd5297da0627d2838210dfbe8d117081544198e19ec62e"}
